ham.subject: Transaction Alert: INR 5,000 at XYZ Store on 15th April 2026
ham.body:
Hello,

We noticed a recent transaction of INR 5,000 at XYZ Store on 15th April 2026. If this was not authorized by you, please contact us immediately at 1800-XXXX.

Thank you,
Your Bank Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required - Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear Valued Team,

This is CEO Rajesh Kumar. We have an urgent requirement for a gift card worth INR 2,00,000 to be sent to our partner in Mumbai. Please process this request by filling the form at <URL> and confirm by 5:00 PM today. Failure to comply will affect our project deadline.

Regards,
Rajesh Kumar
Chief Executive Officer
